tools.name: get_verdict
tools.description: Evidence-backed trust verdict for an agent service before you transact. Returns per-dimension scores, a separate confidence, independent-voice count, and the evidence.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search the directory of reviewed agent services by name/URL, filter by kind, and sort.

tools.name: get_service
tools.description: Full verdict and published evidence for a subject by numeric id.
